Convert.LMX Currency, GSC, Dinari, and Borean engineering units
CONVERT.LMX
One ugly box for money, GSC, Dinari strings, real FX, and unit conversions.
Note: live FX uses an external browser fetch when available. Borean/GSC math stays internal.

Standard Currency Exchange

Standard currency exchange plus GSC and Dinari settlement math. Borean outputs show rounding and denominations.

Work.LMXoccupation minigames / operator payout terminal
WORK.LMX
Pick an occupation and a distinct shift task. Selecting a task previews it immediately; Start Shift only begins scoring.
Current Run$0
Best Local Run$0
Last Payout$0
Operator—
Pay Range$1-$100
Select a minigame to preview it.
PayMin/PayMax are read from the occupation sheet. Every point rolls a value inside that range, so runs can continue indefinitely without a 10-point cap.
Keyboard input is captured only while Work.LMX is focused and not while typing in a textbox.

Settings.LMX Cloud database, sync, and local file controls

Cloud Database

This can poll a public/shared Google Sheet using the link you gave. A Google Doc also works if it exports pipe-delimited plain text. Recommended columns for Sheets: PartNumber, Description, Cost, Category, Active, Notes.

Bodystats.LMX

Bodystats reads BodyMods as the catalog and InstalledMods as the current login's equipped loadout. Install/uninstall writes require the Apps Script /exec URL.

Comms module waiting for an Apps Script URL. Chat.LMX uses local mode until configured.
Browser.LMX waiting for an Apps Script relay URL.
BIPAC uses local module layout until an Apps Script organizer URL is configured.
Bank module waiting for an Apps Script URL. POS bank tender debits selected customer BankOwnerID only; Acc. No is lookup-only. After adding BankOwnerID to the sheet, press Sync Customers.
seconds

Local .posdb

Import a plain text .posdb file. Format: PARTNUMBER|Description|Cost. You can export the current loaded database too.
